text: It is notable that we are all debating exactly which markdown files are most important to feed AI (skills, memory, tool instructions) and in which order to feed them to get the best output. Feels that this is likely a temporary state of affairs in the development of agents

RT @godofprompt: The playbook is simple…

Nerf the current model, right before the release of a smarter model

Release the smarter model, w…
